steps.title: Identify point contributions from each question type
steps.content:
The assignment has two types of questions:
  • 1-point questions: there are $x$ of them, contributing $x$ points total
  • 2-point questions: there are $y$ of them, contributing $2y$ points total

steps.title: Sum contributions to reach total points
steps.content:
The total points must equal 28. Add the contribution from each question type:
$$x + 2y = 28$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
